name: Autumn In My Heart
original_name: รักนี้ชั่วนิรันดร์
overview: Swapped at birth, Pichaa and Pan grow up in starkly different worlds before being returned to their biological families. Years later, Pichaa is reunited with Patin—the boy she once believed was her brother—and their renewed connection deepens into forbidden love, forcing them to confront the painful consequences of fate, family, and identity.

trailers.title: รักนี้ชั่วนิจนิรันดร์ - ตอนที่ 1 (By Truevisions)
